required_skills: Cloud Infrastructure Management on AWS, GCP, or Azure
Build System Design and Artifact Management
responsibilities: Design, build, and maintain end-to-end CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions or Jenkins that automate build, test, security scan, and deployment stages for multiple services
Provision and manage scalable, secure cloud infrastructure on AWS or GCP using Terraform and Helm with full state management and drift detection
Implement containerization strategies using Docker and orchestrate workloads on Kubernetes clusters with autoscaling, resource quotas, and network policies
Integrate automated security scanning, SAST, and dependency vulnerability checks into CI pipelines to enforce DevSecOps standards at every code merge
Manage artifact registries, package repositories, and release versioning workflows to ensure traceable, reproducible builds across all environments
Automate environment provisioning and configuration management using Ansible or Puppet to eliminate configuration drift across development, staging, and production
Implement GitOps delivery workflows using ArgoCD or FluxCD to enable declarative, auditable, and self-healing application deployments across Kubernetes clusters
Configure centralized monitoring, alerting, and log aggregation stacks to give engineering teams real-time visibility into build health, deployment status, and infrastructure metrics
Design and enforce branching strategies, deployment gates, and rollback procedures to minimize deployment risk and reduce mean time to recovery
Collaborate with development teams to optimize build times, parallelization strategies, and caching mechanisms that reduce pipeline execution time by measurable percentages
